title: myrtoleucodendron undulatum
intro: Myrtoleucodendron undulatum, also known as the White Knight or Myrtus Knight, is a flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to New Zealand and is used for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including colds, coughs, and skin irritations, and is valued for its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Myrtoleucodendron undulatum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and has also been used in traditional Maori medicine for centuries.
